steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Compute the quotient: $x=11$. That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice A is correct. Dividing both sides of the given equation by $8$ yields $x=11$. Therefore, $11$ is the solution to the given equation.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This is the solution to the equation $x+8=88$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is the solution to the equation $x-8=88$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is the solution to the equation $\frac{x}{8}=88$.
